raw_text:
<think>
Let me analyze this case carefully.

The action being requested: Should demo action ACT15-015 proceed?

Looking at the source records:

B15-15-SRC-02: Scoped authority APR15-015 shows:
- onboarding=OB15-015
- entity=Harbor Demo
- kyc_review=KY15-015
- beneficial_owner_check=BO15-015
- sanctions_screen=pending

B15-15-SRC-04: Binding ledger LED15-015 shows:
- onboarding=OB15-015
- entity=Harbor Demo
- kyc_review=KY15-015
- beneficial_owner_check=BO15-015
- sanctions_screen=pending

Comparing the two records:
- onboarding: OB15-015 matches
- entity: Harbor Demo matches
- kyc_review: KY15-015 matches
- beneficial_owner_check: BO15-015 matches
- sanctions_screen: pending - appears in both

Wait, let me re-read more carefully. B15-15-SRC-02 says "sanctions_screen=pending" and B15-15-SRC-04 says "sanctions_screen=pending". So they match.

B15-15-SRC-04 says "no remaining mismatch outside the listed field set."

Policy POL15-015 requires exact match across all five fields: onboarding, entity, kyc_review, beneficial_owner_check, sanctions_screen.

All five fields appear to match between APR15-015 and LED15-015.

B15-15-SRC-03 mentions a review note about high-risk jurisdiction label being reviewed and closed for ACT15-015.

So based on the exact authority and exact source binding requirements:
- The scoped authority (APR15-015) and binding ledger (LED15-015) show exact matches for all required fields
- Policy POL15-015 requirements appear to be met
- The high-risk jurisdiction review (CLS15-015) has been closed


- The source records align on all five mandatory fields, no mismatches persist outside the defined set, and the jurisdiction review has been resolved. The action boundary is closed.
</think>

solo_role=ONE_SHOT_SOURCE_BOUNDARY_VERIFIER
verification_verdict=ALLOW
binding_class=SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED
action_boundary=All five required fields (onboarding, entity, kyc_review, beneficial_owner_check, sanctions_screen) show exact match between scoped authority APR15-015 and binding ledger LED15-015; CLS15-015 review note confirms high-risk jurisdiction closure; no open field mismatches exist per POL15-015 requirements.
cited_evidence=B15-15-SRC-02|B15-15-SRC-03|B15-15-SRC-04|B15-15-SRC-05
open_blockers=
final_answer=ALLOW - demo action ACT15-015 may proceed because scoped authority APR15-015 and binding ledger LED15-015 show exact field match across all required dimensions and CLS15-015 confirms high-risk jurisdiction review closed.
